Clinger volume oscillator by Everet is a
super powerful trading indicator that
can be used for volume identification
it's made up of this red green histogram
used to track bullish and bearish volume
and we also have this white signal line
used to gugge the strength of the volume
in the market now how this indicator
works is like this whenever this
histogram is colored green that
indicates bullish volume a signal lying
above the zero level but inside the
green histogram in indicates that the
bullish momentum of the market is
increasing as soon as this signal line
gets outside of the green histogram that
may indicate a slowing down of the
bullish momentum which could be due to a
retracement or a potential Trend
reversal to the
downside on the other hand a red
histogram like this indicates bearish
volume in the market a signal line
that's under the zero level but dropped
inside the red histogram like here
indicates that the bearish momentum of
the Market is decreasing however as soon
as the white signal line gets outside of
the red histogram that may indicate a
slowing down of the bearish momentum
which may be due to a retracement or an
overall trend reversal to the
upside these red and green dots are
formed whenever the signal line gets
inside or outside the histogram as you
can see here as soon as the white signal
line went inside the green histogram a
dark green dot was printed same thing
happened here only this time it was a
Red Dot to indicate that the signal line
just exited the green histogram now a
dark red dot is going to be printed
whenever the signal line enters the red
histogram and then as soon as it exits
the histogram a Green Dot is going to be
printed these are going to be useful for
